understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` within the turn/attempt limits, completing the current level (BP35) and continuing through subsequent levels until the game is won, while avoiding hazards like spikes that immediately end the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only), or CLICK a specific tile at [x, y] to interact (typically removing breakable `x` blocks). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o/m/w` etc.), hit a hazard, or reach the goal. Landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. CLICK actions do not move the player unless removing a block opens a fall path, in which case gravity resolves afterward; UNDO reverts the previous action. Levels allow 2 attempts with a 50-turn budget per attempt, and structured previews (left/right landing and corridor scan) indicate where a move will ultimately land and whether it creates a passage to a different y-section.
